info.title: HT Recruitment Portal API
info.description: Backend API contract for the HT Recruitment Portal. Authentication is handled separately.

delete.description: Fails if the job has active applications.

get.description: Views, application timeline, source breakdown, and status stats for a single job.
Audit trail of events for a job (applications received, stage changes, notes, etc.).

patch.summary: Move application to a different pipeline stage

409.description: Stage requires approval (triggers approval request automatically)

patch.summary: Set a rating on an application

post.summary: Add a note to an application

get.summary: List pipeline stages for a job

delete.description: Fails if any applications are currently in this stage.

get.description: Full candidate profile with experience, education, certifications.

patch.summary: Move candidate to a different stage
patch.description: Records stage history automatically. Returns 409 if the target stage requires approval.

get.description: Get the pipeline instance tracking this candidate's stage progression.
Get pipeline template with all stage configs.

delete.description: Fails if any active candidates are using it.

post.description: Typically triggered automatically when moving a candidate to an approval-gated stage.
Candidate is moved to the target stage.

post.summary: Add a comment to an approval request

get.summary: List notifications for the current user

get.description: Aggregate stats, chart data, and recent jobs for the dashboard page.
Weekly aggregated application counts for the area chart.
Candidate counts per pipeline stage bucket.
Source breakdown for the pie chart.

Conflict.description: Conflict — resource is in use or has dependencies
